posts.title: How We Fixed a Streaming Connection Pool Leak
posts.description: How we tracked down and fixed a connection pool leak that caused OpenAI streaming requests to hang after 30 minutes.

posts.title: Incident Report: SERVER_ROOT_PATH regression broke UI routing
posts.description: How a single line removal caused UI 404s for all deployments using SERVER_ROOT_PATH, and the tests we added to prevent it from happening again.
